title: Register fails with 'secret already exists' error
description:
When trying to register a user that was partially created before (secret exists but KrknUser doesn't), registration fails with:
  
Error: secrets "krknuser-password-xxx" already exists

This happens because a previous registration attempt created the secret but failed to create the KrknUser.

Location: internal/api/auth_handlers.go:230

Fix: Handle 'already exists' error for secrets:
1. Check if secret already exists before creating
2. If it exists and KrknUser doesn't, delete old secret and create new one
3. If both exist, return proper 'user already exists' error

title: Fix is-registered endpoint - KrknUserList type error
description:
The /api/v1/auth/is-registered endpoint is failing with 'no matches for kind KrknUserList'.

Error: failed to get restmapping: no matches for kind "KrknUserList" in version "krkn.krkn-chaos.dev/v1alpha1"

Location: internal/api/auth_handlers.go:73

Cause: Trying to use KrknUserList type which doesn't exist. Should use KrknUser with List() method instead.

Fix: Update IsRegistered handler to properly list KrknUser CRDs with admin label.

title: KrknUser created with Active=false, should be Active=true by default
description:
When creating a new KrknUser via /api/v1/auth/register, the Status.Active field is set to false by default.

Expected: Status.Active should be true for newly created users.

Location: internal/api/auth_handlers.go - Register() function

Fix: Set Status.Active = true when creating new KrknUser instances.
